Christmas with the Kranks (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $73,701,902Details
International Box Office $22,767,285
Worldwide Box Office $96,469,187
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,570,867 (29.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:76.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,393 opening theaters/3,416 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $134,257,886

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 24th, 2004 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: December 3rd, 2004 (Wide), released as Christmas With The Kranks (Australia)
Video Release: November 8th, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for brief language and suggestive content.
Running Time: 98 minutes
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Neighbors from Hell
Release detail: Christmas in November
Social setting: Christmas
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Revolution Studios, 1492 Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
